roa.docketEntryComment: DA PEOP OPPOS TO DEFT MOT FOR RETURN OF PROP FILED TODAY IN RM101
ACCT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER FINES AND FEES TO COLLECTIONS UNIT
/CAL:RETURN OF PROPERTY - STATUS OF WRIT/X:DA INFORMS THE COURT IT WILL NOT FILE A WRIT IN THIS MATTER AND AGREES TO RETURN DEFT'S PROPERTY AS ORDERED,/
/CAL: DA 1203,2PC MOT/CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:02-06-09/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/S19/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/

/X DEFT IS DNA COMPLIANT/CCC 2356566/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 6M/CTS  78/DNA/WS/VF4:200/11590/DTC/RX/LF/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PFIA:500 PLUS PENALTY ASSESS $1399,50/SA2:6TH & MENACE; 2030 MISSION/PROBFINE/SECFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL: PRELIM HRG/X: LAST DAY OF 4-3-08 IS SET ASIDE AND PRELIM HRG IS VACATED,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/SA2:2030 MISSION STREET, SF,CA (150 YARDS)/SAORD/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:04-23-08/
/CAL:DECISION ON MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/MO GRTD/X:RETURN OF PROPERTY IS STAYED 15 DAYS PER DA'S REQUEST/CONTD:STATUS OF WRIT/
/CAL:DECISION ON OPPOS TO MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:COURT HEARS FURTHER ARGUMENTS BY RESPECTIVE COUNSEL ON THE MOTION,/CONT/
/CAL:OPPOS TO MOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/X:COURT HEARS ARGUMENT BY RESPECTIVE COUNSEL AS TO THE MOTION/CONTD:COURT'S DECISION ON THE MOTION/
/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:6 MONTHS/ADDL CTS:31/CCC:MC2356566 AND MC2360087/PROB EXT:06-12-11/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:04-03-08/987,2/BAIL:110,000/CONTD:PRELIM HEARING/DOP /
